conversion_notes: File placed directly into library. IFC2X3 schema; PredefinedType NOTDEFINED in file (corrected to WASHHANDBASIN in product.json). IfcBoundingBox present but values are 1000× too small due to a BIMobject-Lena unit conversion bug (values stored as mm/1000 in a metre-unit file); actual dimensions taken from ePset_BIMobject_BO properties instead. No IfcClassificationReference entities present in file.
